properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Da da da da da da da da da da da da da da da

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the reason for life, the air inside my lungs, You've taken hold of my heart and there's no doubting, That Your love is unexplainable, phenomenal.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And what Your grace has done is nothing but a miracle, So tell me how could I ever turn away from You, When You've always been the way, the life, and the truth.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You've given me a new heart, true reality, I'm living for the One who set me free, You've given mе Your vision, better than a dream, You ain't gotta wakе me up, It's not a fantasy.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da-da-da Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da-da-da

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My friends keep saying I've changed, I'm acting different now, They wanna know what I know, they want the truth and so.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I told them, "If you're free on Friday, come to youth with me, Leave your past right at the door and you'll never be alone."

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You've given me a new heart, true reality, I'm living for the One who set me free, You've given me Your vision, better than a dream.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You ain't gotta wake me up at all, You turned my life right upside down, You set my feet on higher ground, Now I'll never be the same, It's not a phase.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da, Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da-da-da, Da-da-da-da-da-da, da-da, Da-da-da-da-da-da (yep), da-da-da-da.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: I'll never be the same, My heart's forever changed, I know the old me is over and buried in the grave, I don't care what they say 'cause I'll never be ashamed of His love that saved me 180, the type that's never fading.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: So now throw up your hands, If you know Him, then go 'head and call up your friends, 'Cause we out here on a Friday where it began, And if you owe it all to Jesus (one, two), go do your dance. (One, two, three, four)
